summary: General The Company is a pure-play regulated energy delivery business. Its principal executive offices are located at 1200West Century Avenue, P.O.Box5650, Bismarck, North Dakota 58506-5650, telephone (701)530-1000. Montana-Dakota was incorporated under the state laws of Delaware in 1924. The Company was incorporated under the state laws of Delaware in 2018.
